away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Shakira Austin
players.injury_comment: Austin, who missed her first game of the season Wednesday against the Sun, remains day-to-day for Washington. Look for Lauren Betts to get an extended look if Austin is unable to give it a go.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Marine Fauthoux
players.injury_comment: Despite Fauthoux's removal from the injury report ahead of this contest,  she will now be held out for a third consecutive game. She is limited to 12 regular-season appearances while signed to a developmental contract.

players.name: Betnijah Laney-Hamilton
players.injury_comment: Laney-Hamilton will remain on the shelf Friday, but a return is on the table for Sunday's game against the Sparks -- the Liberty want to give her "one more day" to get back on the floor.

players.name: Anneli Maley
players.injury_comment: Maley will sit out Friday's matchup in order to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next opportunity to play will come Sunday in Los Angeles.
